message:
feat(providers): unify agent identity via AgentProvider bridges

Add bidirectional bridge methods between AgentProvider, CassAgent, and
CautService to centralize agent slug resolution. This replaces scattered
hardcoded match statements in mcp.rs and workflows.rs with a single
provider-driven lookup path.

- agent_provider.rs: add canonical_name() alias for API consistency
- cass.rs: add from_provider(), to_provider(), from_slug() bridges
  with ChatGPT variant detection via is_chatgpt_slug()
- caut.rs: add from_provider(), provider_hint() bridges with
  is_openai_slug() helper
- agent_correlator.rs: integrate AgentProvider into PaneAgentState,
  use canonical_name() for slug generation, add metadata fallback
- mcp.rs: refactor parse_caut_service() and parse_cass_agent() to
  use unified provider bridges instead of manual slug matching
- workflows.rs: refactor cass_agent_from_trigger() via CassAgent::from_slug()

All new code includes unit tests for round-trip conversions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
